positive: A vibrant, minimalist geometric animal silhouette design featuring a stylized leaping fox surrounded by abstract floral mandalas and interlocking geometric shapes. The fox should have a clean, highly defined outline, giving it a modern, almost Art Deco feel. Use a color palette of deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and cream against a white background. Composition should be highly centralized, suitable for a chest print on t-shirts. The style must be high contrast, graphic vector art with crisp edges, resembling screen printing or linocut techniques. Flat color areas with minimal gradient transitions. Central subject focus, excellent readability, clean lines.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, grainy, noise, text, logo, watermark, signature, messy, complex background, bad anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, disfigured, jpeg artifacts
